name: Olive Garden Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions until barely "al dente" and drain.
2. Prepare the Alfredo sauce by heating water to a boil in the bottom of a double boiler, adding butter, cream, and pepper to the top pot, and stirring in Parmesan until melted and blended. Set aside at room temperature.
3. Divide the sauce into 2 equal portions. Refrigerate one portion for use later.
4. Combine all ingredients for the ricotta cheese mixture in a bowl and blend thoroughly with a rubber spatula. Set aside at room temperature.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Coat the bottom and sides of a 9x13 baking dish with vegetable spray.
7. Lay out cooked lasagna strips (about 4) to cover the entire bottom.
8. Spread 1-1/4 cups of the ricotta cheese mixture evenly over the strips.
9. Top with mixed vegetables: 2 cups broccoli florets, 2 cups carrots sliced into 1/4-inch pieces, and 2 cups mushrooms sliced into 1/4-inch pieces.
10. Lay out 9 slices of mozzarella cheese to cover the vegetable layer.
11. Repeat steps 8-10 for a second layer.
12. Top the second layer with lasagna strips and spread them evenly with the remaining ricotta cheese mixture to finish.
13. Cover the baking dish tightly with foil, sprayed side down.
14. Bake in the preheated oven for about an hour or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
15. Remove from the oven and allow to sit for a few minutes, covered, before cutting and serving.
16. Immediately prior to serving, heat the reserved portion of Alfredo sauce and ladle the hot sauce over each slice of lasagna as it is served.
